title: Stage greeting with Anno Tsurumaki Maeda and Ogata

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki and Maeda             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Sat Apr 10, 2021 11:36 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T6AuqHJN-UI Video from the stage greeting.

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Whitetiger739 » Sun Apr 11, 2021 12:23 am https://ha-navi.com/kwo-clo (Through auto-translate) This article came out recently from the stage greeting with only mentioning that according to Director Maeda, there's an incomplete body of the copied/clone of Kaworu accompany with the original Shikinami clone in the Unit-13. Of course, it's still very recently and currently in process of full analysis of the stage greeting and the new info, so we'll have to wait until more details, translation, & analysis are provided.

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Wed Apr 14, 2021 1:28 pm Whitetiger739 wrote: https://ha-navi.com/kwo-clo (Through auto-translate) This article came out recently from the stage greeting with only mentioning that according to Director Maeda, there's an incomplete body of the copied/clone of Kaworu accompany with the original Shikinami clone in the Unit-13. Of course, it's still very recently and currently in process of full analysis of the stage greeting and the new info, so we'll have to wait until more details, translation, & analysis are provided.

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 14, 2021 1:32 pm I didn't post Yamashita's tweet on the subject in every thread, but maybe I should have. See here .

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Apr 14, 2021 2:14 pm Cookie H Wilson wrote: What?!

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Wed Apr 14, 2021 2:59 pm His soul is gone? I thought that Unit 13 being an Adams (or the Adam or God or the owner of the fifth cross) had absorbed Kaworu soul and this union made him the 13th Angel that was never supposed to exist. Also I thought OG Shikinami was the soul inside unit 02 to allow her to pilot and once unit 13 (now the thirteen Angel + a surviving Adams) absorbed unit 2 that where OG Shikanami confronted that Asuka we got to know in the rebuild I also thought Kaworu was the soul of an Adam (possibly the key of N which can be the same that happended was in NGE where they experimented by putting some human genes in Adam splitting it into the embryo and Kaworu soul), I also thought Mark 6 was an Adams and Unit 1 I dunno I just can’t leave the OG idea that it was the clone of Lilith Since it would beautiful to imagine Gendo inside Adams body and Yui inside a Lilith clone body. By killing themselves with the Spear or Gaius it would look like a rebirth by killing the old Gods and reuniting the lovers all in once. Adam Vessels have an at field Adams seem to not have one And the ships. Are they the four missing lances? Too much confusion

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Apr 14, 2021 3:09 pm Cookie H Wilson wrote: His soul is gone?

[]: Re: Stage greeting with Anno, Tsurumaki, Maeda and Ogata             Quote Post by Raikyu » Wed Apr 14, 2021 3:52 pm Cookie H Wilson wrote: His soul is gone? I thought that Unit 13 being and Adams (or the Adam or God or the owner of the fifth cross) had absorbed Kaworu soul and this union made him the 13th Angel that was ever supposed to exist.
